synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2025-20911 Oracle Linux 9 bootc bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-20911
description:
[1.8.0-3]
- Bump release as rhpkg needed an update to tag for 9.7.z
  Resolves: #RHEL-113361
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-20911

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20911.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
bootc-1.8.0-3.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
system-reinstall-bootc-1.8.0-3.el9_7.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
bootc-1.8.0-3.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
system-reinstall-bootc-1.8.0-3.el9_7.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/bootc-1.8.0-3.el9_7.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[1.8.0-3]
- Bump release as rhpkg needed an update to tag for 9.7.z
  Resolves: #RHEL-113361
